error.invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.service_unavailable: HorizonIQ is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.

abort.bootstrap_failed: HorizonIQ could not validate your subscription.
abort.subscription_required: A HorizonIQ trial or subscription is required before forecasting can start.
abort.trial_start_failed: HorizonIQ could not start the trial.

user.title: Connect HorizonIQ
user.description: No subscription connected. Sign in or create an account to connect this Home Assistant installation. Forecasting starts only when you have an active trial or subscription.

data_description.home_assistant_installation_id: This installation ID is sent to HorizonIQ as the device ID for this Home Assistant installation.
data_description.battery_capacity_sensor: Entity ID that provides current battery capacity.
data_description.test_mode: Use a sandbox HorizonIQ portal instead of production.
data_description.portal_connection_url: Required only in Test Mode. Enter the full sandbox /portal/horizoniq/connect URL.

no_subscription.title: No subscription connected
no_subscription.description: HorizonIQ returned `{reason}` for Home Assistant installation `{installation_id}`. Subscribe at {subscribe_url}, start a trial if available, then check again or reconnect the integration. Signing in and checking again will not start a trial.

data_description.home_assistant_installation_id: Copy this device ID if support needs to check the subscription or trial state for this Home Assistant installation.

confirm_start_trial.title: Start 14-day trial
confirm_start_trial.description: Starting the trial begins your 14-day period immediately. The trial cannot be restarted for this account or Home Assistant installation.

data.confirm_start_trial: I understand. Start the trial now.

error.invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.

init.title: HorizonIQ settings
init.description: Edit HorizonIQ connection values and cached tokens.

data_description.home_assistant_installation_id: Read-only identifier for this Home Assistant installation.
data_description.battery_capacity_sensor: Entity ID that provides current battery capacity.
data_description.hash: Deterministic result of the most recent forecast.
data_description.registration_data: Cached registration data returned by the forecast endpoint.
data_description.forecast_device_id: Optional canonical device ID for app trial binding.
data_description.forecast_device_token: Optional portal-generated trial device token. Sent only as X-HorizonIQ-Device-Token.

entitlement_lost.title: HorizonIQ subscription required
entitlement_lost.description: Your HorizonIQ trial or subscription is no longer valid. Subscribe at {subscribe_url}, then reload or reconnect the integration.

forecast_credential_refresh.title: HorizonIQ forecast credentials could not be refreshed
forecast_credential_refresh.description: Home Assistant could not refresh HorizonIQ forecast credentials. Forecasting will continue with the last known good credentials until a valid no-subscription response is returned.
